# Lead Effectiveness

> **Type:** Analytics
> **Provenance:** 3P
> **Contexts:** [interaction, exhibitor]
> **Measures:** [lead-capture-and-delivery]

## Purpose

Lightweight measurement of lead capture effectiveness — a SUPPORTING context service offered to exhibitors. Measures whether lead retrieval is driving exhibitor satisfaction and ROI perception, which feeds back into rebooking decisions.

## Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Dimensions | Refresh |
|--------|---------|------------|---------|
| **leads_per_exhibitor** | total_leads / exhibitors_with_lead_retrieval | edition | per-edition |
| **lead_retrieval_adoption** | exhibitors_with_license / total_exhibitors | edition | per-edition |

## Benchmarks

| Segment | Target | Signal |
|---------|--------|--------|
| Leads per exhibitor | > 50 per show | Meaningful ROI data |
| Adoption rate | >= 30% | Service is valued |

## Capabilities

- lead-volume-tracking
- lead-service-adoption-analysis

## Feedback Loop

- **Measured in:** Interaction
- **Consumed by:** Exhibitor (ROI reporting drives rebooking)
- **Drives:** Lead retrieval pricing, service packaging decisions
- **Maturity path:** descriptive (sufficient for SUPPORTING context)

## Related Patterns

- `lead-capture-and-delivery` — the domain pattern being measured
